title: 3 Reasons Apple Will Be Booted From The Magnificent 7 By End Of 2030
text: AAPL's AI strategy is slow and dependent on external partners, lacking proprietary breakthroughs compared to peers like Google and Microsoft. Apple's revenue growth, forward EPS expectations, and valuation are the least attractive among the Mag 7, making it vulnerable to a valuation correction. Upcoming IPOs of AI-native firms like Anthropic and OpenAI threaten to displace slower-growing, richly valued incumbents such as AAPL.

title: Huawei unveils new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
text: Huawei announced a new chip design approach that will be used for the first time this fall in its Kirin smartphone chips. That has significant implications not only for Nvidia but also for Apple's iPhone sales.

title: Apple vs. Microsoft: What Their Revenue Trends Reveal for Investors
text: Microsoft currently demonstrates a steadier and more consistent upward revenue trajectory, while Apple generates a noticeably higher overall volume of sales despite its fluctuations. Apple experiences sharp quarter-over-quarter variations with massive seasonal spikes at the end of each calendar year, whereas Microsoft maintains a much more stable sequential growth pattern.

title: Could Apple, Netflix or Amazon buy IMAX? shares rally 16%
text: Shares of IMAX jumped 16% on Friday after a report from The Wall Street Journal said the company is exploring a potential sale and has approached entertainment companies as possible buyers, fueling speculation that the premium cinema technology company could become an acquisition target for major media and technology firms. According to people familiar with the matter cited in the report, the sale process remains in its early stages and may not ultimately lead to a transaction.

title: Apple Stock at 52-Week High: Buy, Sell or Hold?
